basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with 1-year Diploma course in computer application with one year of experience in the related field
qualification.details: Graduate with a 1-year Diploma course in Computer Application. One year of experience in the related field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates with a one-year Diploma course in Computer Application and possess one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Data Entry Operator announced by AIIMS Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written examination, an interview, or both, depending on the institute's discretion.

faq.question: Q8. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 249203.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article once released.
